title: Technical Expertise
description: A curated overview of the technologies, tools, and practices I use to design, build, and maintain modern web applications.

frontend.title: Frontend
frontend.summary: Modern UI development, scalable component systems, and high-performance web applications.

backend.title: Backend
backend.summary: Server-side development, APIs, authentication, business logic, and scalable architectures.

databases.title: Databases
databases.summary: Relational and NoSQL databases, data modeling, querying, and performance optimization.

devops.title: DevOps & Tools
devops.summary: Containerization, version control, CI/CD pipelines, and deployment workflows.

testing.title: Testing
testing.summary: Automated testing, API validation, and quality assurance for reliable systems.

api.title: API Design & Conception
api.summary: Designing, modeling, and documenting APIs with clear standards and contracts.

collaboration.title: Collaboration & Design
collaboration.summary: Agile collaboration, task management, and design-to-development workflows.

items.graphql: Designing typed APIs with flexible queries and strong frontend integration.
items.restapi: Building predictable REST endpoints with clean contracts and scalable resource modeling.
items.uml: Modeling systems, flows, and architecture decisions with clear technical diagrams.
items.laravel: Shipping robust PHP applications with clean structure, APIs, and product-ready workflows.
items.symfony: Building maintainable backend systems with solid architecture and reusable services.
items.supabase: Using hosted Postgres, auth, storage, and realtime features to accelerate product delivery.
items.nodejs: Creating scalable server-side services and APIs with JavaScript and TypeScript.
items.expressjs: Building lightweight HTTP APIs and middleware-driven backend services.
items.nestjs: Structuring enterprise-grade backend applications with modules, DI, and TypeScript.
items.dotnet: Working with .NET applications across desktop and backend use cases.
items.figma: Collaborating with product and design teams from wireframes to polished UI decisions.
items.jira: Tracking delivery, priorities, and execution across structured product workflows.
items.scrum: Planning and delivering work through iterative sprints, ceremonies, and shared accountability.
items.kanban: Managing flow, work in progress, and delivery visibility with lean processes.
items.mysql: Designing relational schemas and queries for reliable transactional systems.
items.mongodb: Modeling flexible document data for products that benefit from schema freedom.
items.postgresql: Using advanced SQL capabilities for performant, scalable production systems.
items.sqlite: Working with lightweight embedded databases for simple apps and prototyping.
items.docker: Containerizing apps and services for consistent local and production environments.
items.git: Managing version control, branching, and collaborative development workflows.
items.gitlab: Using GitLab for source control, CI pipelines, and team collaboration.
items.github: Building and shipping through GitHub repositories, issues, reviews, and Actions.
items.cicd: Automating testing, validation, and deployment with reliable delivery pipelines.
items.react: Building modern component-driven interfaces with strong state and rendering patterns.
items.nextjs: Shipping production-ready React apps with server rendering, routing, and performance in mind.
items.typescript: Writing safer, more maintainable JavaScript with strong static typing.
items.angular: Developing structured frontend applications with a full framework approach.
items.spartanng: Using Spartan NG to compose accessible Angular interfaces with headless primitives.
items.tailwind: Designing fast, consistent UIs with utility-first styling.
items.shadcn: Composing modern React interfaces with reusable primitives and clean design systems.
items.materialui: Building polished interfaces quickly with a mature React component ecosystem.
items.tanstack: Managing complex async state, tables, and data-heavy frontend workflows.
items.zod: Defining validation schemas that keep forms, APIs, and types aligned.
items.zustand: Managing lightweight client state with simple, scalable store patterns.
items.robot: Automating end-to-end and workflow tests with readable keyword-driven suites.
items.postman: Designing, testing, and validating API behavior during development.
items.jest: Writing unit and integration tests for reliable frontend and backend logic.
items.mocha: Testing JavaScript applications with flexible assertion and runner setups.
